channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 646a9378-973f-42fd-927f-62d1c4381f50
Display name: Context Cache Container Contributor
Description: Allows creating and managing Azure Context Cache Container resource. This role is in preview and subject to change.
Link: https://management.azure.com/646a9378-973f-42fd-927f-62d1c4381f50?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: b0ffeab8-d678-4570-b532-ce96bf97b032
Display name: Context Cache Administrator
Description: Provides full to manage all Azure Context Cache resources. This role is in preview and subject to change.
Link: https://management.azure.com/b0ffeab8-d678-4570-b532-ce96bf97b032?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 52ced3dd-dbb6-41a0-9ce5-61a056be97b8
Display name: IdentityNotifications.Read.All
Description: Read all identity notification settings and templates
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/52ced3dd-dbb6-41a0-9ce5-61a056be97b8

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: d9fe7b9f-cb27-4289-9cb4-54debd9d3c25
Display name: IdentityNotifications.ReadWrite.All
Description: Read and write all identity notification settings and templates
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/d9fe7b9f-cb27-4289-9cb4-54debd9d3c25
